framework.name: OAuth 2.0 as Industry-Standard Open Protocol
framework.description: OAuth 2.0 was released by IETF as RFC 6749/6750 in 2012 and is now the industry standard for authorization. Being an open standard (not proprietary) means any implementer can build on it without vendor lock-in.
framework.raw_quote: In 2012, the Internet Engineering Task Force (IETF) released OAuth 2.0 as RFC 6749 and RFC 6750... OAuth 2.0 replaced OAuth 1.0 and is now the industry standard.
